(born 21 August 1985) is a British actress. She is known for portraying Alison in [The Inbetweeners Movie](/wiki/The_Inbetweeners_Movie "The Inbetweeners Movie"), Zoë Walker in *[White Lines](/wiki/White_Lines_(TV_series) "White Lines (TV series)")*, Max Meladze in *[The Recruit](/wiki/The_Recruit_(American_TV_series) "The Recruit (American TV series)")*, [Lucrezia](/wiki/Lucrezia_Donati "Lucrezia Donati") in *[Da Vinci's Demons](/wiki/Da_Vinci%27s_Demons "Da Vinci's Demons")*, [Meredith Quill](/wiki/Meredith_Quill_(Marvel_Cinematic_Universe) "Meredith Quill (Marvel Cinematic Universe)") in *[Guardians of the Galaxy](/wiki/Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_(film) "Guardians of the Galaxy (film)")* and its sequel *[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2](/wiki/Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_Vol._2 "Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2")*, and Viviane Wembly in *[Transformers: The Last Knight](/wiki/Transformers:_The_Last_Knight "Transformers: The Last Knight")*.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

British actress (born 1985)

| Laura Haddock | |
| --- | --- |
| Haddock in February 2015 | |
| Born | Laura Jane Haddock   (1985-08-21) 21 August 1985 (age 40)  [Enfield](/wiki/London_Borough_of_Enfield "London Borough of Enfield"), London, England |
| Occupation | Actress |
| Years active | 2007–present |
| Spouse | [Sam Claflin](/wiki/Sam_Claflin "Sam Claflin")  ​  ​ (m. 2013; sep. 2019)​ |
| Children | 2 |

**Laura Jane Haddock** (born 21 August 1985) is a British actress. She is known for portraying Alison in [The Inbetweeners Movie](/wiki/The_Inbetweeners_Movie "The Inbetweeners Movie"), Zoë Walker in *[White Lines](/wiki/White_Lines_(TV_series) "White Lines (TV series)")*, Max Meladze in *[The Recruit](/wiki/The_Recruit_(American_TV_series) "The Recruit (American TV series)")*, [Lucrezia](/wiki/Lucrezia_Donati "Lucrezia Donati") in *[Da Vinci's Demons](/wiki/Da_Vinci%27s_Demons "Da Vinci's Demons")*, [Meredith Quill](/wiki/Meredith_Quill_(Marvel_Cinematic_Universe) "Meredith Quill (Marvel Cinematic Universe)") in *[Guardians of the Galaxy](/wiki/Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_(film) "Guardians of the Galaxy (film)")* and its sequel *[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2](/wiki/Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_Vol._2 "Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2")*, and Viviane Wembly in *[Transformers: The Last Knight](/wiki/Transformers:_The_Last_Knight "Transformers: The Last Knight")*.

## Early life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Laura_Haddock&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Early life")]

Laura Jane Haddock was born on 21 August 1985[[1]](#cite_note-1) in [Enfield](/wiki/London_Borough_of_Enfield "London Borough of Enfield"), [London](/wiki/London "London"), to a [reflexologist](/wiki/Reflexologist "Reflexologist") mother and a [financier](/wiki/Financier "Financier") father.[[2]](#cite_note-2) She was raised in [Harpenden](/wiki/Harpenden "Harpenden"), [Hertfordshire](/wiki/Hertfordshire "Hertfordshire"), where she attended [St George's School](/wiki/St_George%27s_School,_Harpenden "St George's School, Harpenden").[[3]](#cite_note-Times1-3) She left school at the age of 17 and moved to London to study drama. She trained at [Arts Educational School](/wiki/Arts_Educational_Schools,_London "Arts Educational Schools, London") in [Chiswick](/wiki/Chiswick "Chiswick").[[4]](#cite_note-OK1-4)

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Laura_Haddock&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Career")]

Haddock made her television debut in the [television pilot](/wiki/Television_pilot "Television pilot") *Plus One*, part of the [Comedy Showcase](/wiki/Comedy_Showcase "Comedy Showcase") 2008.[[5]](#cite_note-5) In 2009, Haddock played the lead role of Natasha in the [ITV1](/wiki/ITV1 "ITV1") [comedy drama](/wiki/Comedy_drama "Comedy drama") *[Monday Monday](/wiki/Monday_Monday "Monday Monday")*, and appeared as Samantha in series two and three of *[How Not to Live Your Life](/wiki/How_Not_to_Live_Your_Life "How Not to Live Your Life")*.[[6]](#cite_note-ITV1-6)

In 2011, she appeared in the [Cinemax](/wiki/Cinemax "Cinemax")/[Sky](/wiki/Sky_UK "Sky UK") TV drama *[Strike Back: Project Dawn](/wiki/Strike_Back:_Project_Dawn "Strike Back: Project Dawn")* for two episodes, as the kidnapped daughter of an illegal arms dealer. She starred as [Lucrezia Donati](/wiki/Lucrezia_Donati "Lucrezia Donati"),[[7]](#cite_note-Cast-7) the mistress of [Lorenzo de' Medici](/wiki/Lorenzo_de%27_Medici "Lorenzo de' Medici") and lover of [Leonardo da Vinci](/wiki/Leonardo_da_Vinci "Leonardo da Vinci") in the 2013 series *[Da Vinci's Demons](/wiki/Da_Vinci%27s_Demons "Da Vinci's Demons")*.[[8]](#cite_note-8) She played Alison, [Will McKenzie](/wiki/Will_McKenzie "Will McKenzie")'s love interest, in *[The Inbetweeners Movie](/wiki/The_Inbetweeners_Movie "The Inbetweeners Movie")* (2011),[[9]](#cite_note-9) for which she was nominated for the [Empire Award for Best Female Newcomer](/wiki/Empire_Award_for_Best_Newcomer "Empire Award for Best Newcomer").[[10]](#cite_note-10)

Haddock's theatre credits include *Famous Last*, which formed part of the 2009 [Sky Arts](/wiki/Sky_Arts "Sky Arts") Theatre Live! project,[[11]](#cite_note-SkyArts-11) and *Rutherford & Son* at [Northern Stage](/wiki/Northern_Stage,_Newcastle_upon_Tyne "Northern Stage, Newcastle upon Tyne").[[12]](#cite_note-WOS1-12) In 2014, she portrayed Meredith Quill in *[Guardians of the Galaxy](/wiki/Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_(film) "Guardians of the Galaxy (film)")*, a role she reprised in its 2017 sequel *[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2](/wiki/Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_Vol._2 "Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2")*. She appears in the ITV series, *The Level*, and played Vivian Wembley in the 2017 film *[Transformers: The Last Knight](/wiki/Transformers:_The_Last_Knight "Transformers: The Last Knight")*.[[13]](#cite_note-13)

In 2021, Haddock starred in a Christmas marketing campaign for British furniture and home accessories retailer [OKA](/wiki/OKA_Direct "OKA Direct").[[14]](#cite_note-ver1-14) In 2022, she starred as Maxine Meladze in the [Netflix](/wiki/Netflix "Netflix") spy-adventure television series *[The Recruit](/wiki/The_Recruit_(American_TV_series) "The Recruit (American TV series)")*.

## Personal life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Laura_Haddock&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personal life")]

Haddock married English actor [Sam Claflin](/wiki/Sam_Claflin "Sam Claflin") in July 2013 after dating for two years.[[15]](#cite_note-15) They have a son and a daughter.[[16]](#cite_note-16) On 20 August 2019, Haddock and Claflin announced their legal separation.[[17]](#cite_note-17)[[18]](#cite_note-18)
